blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,073 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
